overview: The system is a two-component architecture consisting of a Go REST API backend (`todo-api`) and a React SPA frontend (`todo-web`), both deployed as Docker containers on Kubernetes. The backend manages all data persistence in SQLite, handles JWT-based authentication, and exposes a RESTful JSON API on port 9090; the frontend is a statically built SPA served by Nginx on port 80, which communicates exclusively with the backend via HTTP REST calls using a bearer token stored in localStorage.
requirements: Users can register with a unique email and a password of at least 8 characters; passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes (never plain text).
Users can log in with email and password and receive a JWT; sessions last 24 hours by default and up to 30 days with 'remember me'.
Users can log out, immediately invalidating their session token via a server-side blocklist.
Unauthenticated requests to protected routes return HTTP 401 and the frontend redirects to the login page.
Users can request a password reset link sent to their registered email; the reset token expires after 1 hour.
Authenticated users can create a task with a required title and optional description, category, due date, and status.
Authenticated users can view all their tasks in a list with full CRUD operations (view, edit, delete).
Task deletion requires an explicit confirmation step before the permanent delete is executed.
Users can toggle a task between active and completed with a single action.
Each task records and displays its creation timestamp and last-updated timestamp.
Users can create, rename, and delete custom categories; deleting a category sets all associated tasks to uncategorized.
Each task can be assigned to exactly one category or remain uncategorized.
Users can assign an optional due date (date and time) to any task and later clear it.
Tasks past their due date that are not completed are visually flagged as overdue in the UI.
Users can filter tasks by status (All / Active / Completed) and by category.
Users can sort tasks by creation date, due date, or title in ascending or descending order.
Users can search tasks by keyword matched against title and description.
Active filter and sort preferences are preserved in URL query parameters within a session.
The task list UI updates immediately on create, update, toggle, or delete without a full page reload (optimistic updates).
The application is fully responsive and usable on both desktop and mobile browsers.
All API inputs are validated server-side; invalid inputs return structured JSON error responses with HTTP 400.
All SQL queries use parameterized statements to prevent SQL injection; React JSX escaping prevents XSS.
The task list for any user must load within 2 seconds under normal conditions and support up to 500 tasks without degradation.
All data is user-scoped: the API enforces that a user can only read or modify their own tasks and categories.
Every service exposes a GET /health endpoint returning HTTP 200 when healthy.

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Backend REST API for the Todo management application
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok

  /api/auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      operationId: registerUser
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '409':
          description: Email already in use

  /api/auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Login with email and password
      operationId: loginUser
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                remember:
                  type: boolean
                  default: false
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials

  /api/auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout current user
      operationId: logoutUser
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Logged out successfully

  /api/auth/password-reset/request:
    post:
      summary: Request a password reset email
      operationId: requestPasswordReset
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Reset email sent if account exists

  /api/auth/password-reset/confirm:
    post:
      summary: Confirm password reset with token
      operationId: confirmPasswordReset
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [token, password]
              properties:
                token:
                  type: string
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Password reset successful
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'

  /api/tasks:
    get:
      summary: List all tasks for the authenticated user
      operationId: listTasks
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [all, active, completed]
            default: all
        - name: category_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: sort_by
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [created_at, due_date, title]
            default: created_at
        - name: sort_dir
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [asc, desc]
            default: desc
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      operationId: createTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /api/tasks/{taskId}:
    get:
      summary: Get a single task by ID
      operationId: getTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      operationId: updateTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      operationId: deleteTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Task deleted
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /api/tasks/{taskId}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      operationId: toggleTaskComplete
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [completed]
              properties:
                completed:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task completion status updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /api/categories:
    get:
      summary: List all categories for the authenticated user
      operationId: listCategories
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
    post:
      summary: Create a new category
      operationId: createCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Category created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /api/categories/{categoryId}:
    put:
      summary: Rename a category
      operationId: updateCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/categoryId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Category updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a category (tasks become uncategorized)
      operationId: deleteCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/categoryId'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Category deleted
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    taskId:
      name: taskId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    categoryId:
      name: categoryId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request payload
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication token
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

  schemas:
    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        token:
          type: string
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'

    User:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, completed]
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        category_name:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        is_overdue:
          type: boolean
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, completed]
          default: active

    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        task_count:
          type: integer
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CategoryInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
components.componentAgentInstructions:
## todo-api — Go / net/http Backend Service

### Overview
Implement a RESTful JSON API backend for a personal todo management application. Use Go with the standard `net/http` package (no external HTTP framework). Listen on port **9090**. Use SQLite (via `github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3`) as the database — store the DB file at `/data/todo.db` and ensure the directory is created on startup. Use UUIDs (`github.com/google/uuid`) for all entity IDs.

---

### Project Structure
```
/todo-api
  main.go
  Dockerfile
  go.mod
  go.sum
  internal/
    db/         # database init, migrations
    handler/    # HTTP handlers grouped by domain
    middleware/ # JWT auth, CORS, logging
    model/      # domain structs
    service/    # business logic
```

---

### Database Schema
Run schema migrations on startup:

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS password_reset_tokens (
  token TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  expires_at DATETIME NOT NULL,
  used INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',  -- 'active' | 'completed'
  category_id TEXT REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  due_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
```

---

### Authentication
- Use `golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt` (cost 12) to hash passwords before storage. Never store plain text.
- Issue JWT tokens using `github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5` with HS256. Read the JWT secret from env var `JWT_SECRET` (fail on startup if not set).
- Token TTL: 24 hours normally; 30 days if the `remember` field is `true` on login.
- Auth middleware: extract `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header, validate JWT, inject `userID` into request context. Return `401` if invalid/missing.
- Apply auth middleware to all `/api/tasks` and `/api/categories` routes.
- For logout: maintain an in-memory token blocklist (map[string]time.Time keyed by JWT ID `jti`). On logout, add the token's `jti` to the blocklist. Prune expired entries periodically (every hour via a goroutine).
- Password reset: generate a cryptographically random 32-byte hex token, store in `password_reset_tokens` table with `expires_at = now + 1 hour`. Log the reset link to stdout (format: `PASSWORD_RESET_LINK: /reset?token=<token>`) since no mail server is configured. On confirm, validate token is unused and unexpired, bcrypt the new password, mark token used.

---

### Task Logic
- `is_overdue` is a computed field: `due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < NOW() AND status = 'active'`.
- `category_name` is joined from categories on read.
- Filtering via query params:
  - `status`: filter `tasks.status` (skip filter if `all`)
  - `category_id`: exact match on `tasks.category_id`
  - `search`: `WHERE (title LIKE ? OR description LIKE ?)` with `%keyword%`
- Sorting via `sort_by` + `sort_dir`: map to safe column whitelist (`created_at`, `due_date`, `title`). Default: `created_at DESC`.
- All task reads must scope by `user_id` from the JWT context — never trust a client-supplied user ID.
- On category delete: SQLite ON DELETE SET NULL handles nullification of `category_id` in tasks.
- `updated_at` must be updated on every task mutation via `updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`.

---

### CORS
Add CORS middleware that allows:
- `Access-Control-Allow-Origin`: read from env var `CORS_ORIGIN` (default `*`)
- Methods: `GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS`
- Headers: `Content-Type, Authorization`
- Handle `OPTIONS` preflight with `204`.

---

### Security
- Sanitize all DB inputs via prepared statements (parameterized queries) — never use string concatenation for SQL.
- Set `Content-Security-Policy`, `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `X-Frame-Options: DENY` response headers in middleware.
- Validate email format with a regex on register/login.
- Validate password length ≥ 8 on register and reset-confirm.
- Task title must be non-empty (after trimming whitespace).
- Category name must be non-empty (after trimming).

---

### Error Responses
Always return JSON: `{"error": "<code>", "message": "<human readable>"}`
- `400 Bad Request`: validation failures
- `401 Unauthorized`: missing/invalid/expired JWT
- `404 Not Found`: resource not found or belongs to another user
- `409 Conflict`: duplicate email on register
- `500 Internal Server Error`: unexpected errors (log full error server-side, return generic message to client)

---

### Health Check
`GET /health` — no auth required. Return `200 {"status": "ok"}`. Also ping the DB (`db.Ping()`) and return `503 {"status": "unhealthy", "reason": "db"}` if it fails.

---

### Environment Variables
| Variable | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `JWT_SECRET` | Yes | — | HS256 signing key |
| `PORT` | No | `9090` | Listen port |
| `DB_PATH` | No | `/data/todo.db` | SQLite file path |
| `CORS_ORIGIN` | No | `*` | CORS allowed origin |

---

### Dockerfile
```dockerfile
FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder
RUN apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=linux go build -o server ./main.go

FROM alpine:3.19
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/server .
RUN mkdir -p /data
EXPOSE 9090
CMD ["./server"]
```

---

### Performance
- Enable WAL mode for SQLite: `PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;` on startup.
- Add indexes: `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_user_id ON tasks(user_id);` and `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status ON tasks(status);` and `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_category_id ON tasks(category_id);`.
- Use `database/sql` connection pooling: `db.SetMaxOpenConns(10)`.

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web App
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Static SPA frontend — no backend API of its own. Served by Nginx on port 80.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:80
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check (served by Nginx)
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: App is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok
  /:
    get:
      summary: Serve the React SPA
      operationId: serveApp
      responses:
        '200':
          description: HTML shell for the React application
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
components.componentAgentInstructions:
## todo-web — TypeScript / React Frontend SPA

### Overview
Build a React 18 single-page application using **TypeScript**, **Vite**, and **Tailwind CSS**. Serve via Nginx (port 80) inside Docker. The app communicates exclusively with the `todo-api` backend via REST.

---

### Project Bootstrap
```
npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/forms axios react-router-dom@6 date-fns
```

---

### Project Structure
```
/todo-web
  Dockerfile
  nginx.conf
  index.html
  vite.config.ts
  tailwind.config.ts
  src/
    main.tsx
    App.tsx
    api/          # axios client + typed API functions
    components/   # reusable UI components
    pages/        # route-level components
    hooks/        # custom React hooks
    context/      # AuthContext
    types/        # TypeScript interfaces
```

---

### Environment Configuration
- Read the API base URL from `VITE_API_URL` (injected at build time via Vite). Default to `/api` for same-origin proxying.
- Provide a `.env.example` with `VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:9090`.

---

### Routing (React Router v6)
| Path | Component | Auth Required |
|---|---|---|
| `/login` | LoginPage | No |
| `/register` | RegisterPage | No |
| `/reset-password` | ResetPasswordPage | No |
| `/` | TaskListPage | Yes |
| `/tasks/:id` | TaskDetailPage | Yes |
| `*` | Redirect to `/` | — |

Implement a `<PrivateRoute>` wrapper that reads auth state from `AuthContext` and redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`.

---

### Authentication State (`AuthContext`)
- Store JWT token in `localStorage` under key `todo_token`.
- On app load, read token from localStorage and validate expiry (decode JWT payload, check `exp`). If expired, clear and redirect to login.
- Expose: `user`, `token`, `login(email, password, remember)`, `logout()`, `isAuthenticated`.
- On logout, call `POST /api/auth/logout` then clear localStorage and redirect to `/login`.
- Axios interceptor: attach `Authorization: Bearer <token>` to every request. On `401` response, clear auth state and redirect to `/login`.

---

### Pages

#### LoginPage
- Email + password fields with client-side validation (non-empty, valid email format, password ≥ 8 chars).
- "Remember me" checkbox.
- Link to `/register` and `/reset-password`.
- Show server error messages inline.

#### RegisterPage
- Email + password + confirm password fields.
- Validate confirm password matches.
- On success, auto-login and redirect to `/`.

#### ResetPasswordPage
- If no `?token=` query param: show email input form to request reset. Show generic success message after submission regardless of whether email exists.
- If `?token=` present: show new password + confirm fields. On success, redirect to `/login`.

#### TaskListPage (main view)
This is the primary view. Layout:
- **Top bar**: app name, search input, logout button.
- **Sidebar** (collapsible on mobile): category list with task counts; clicking a category filters the list. "All" option at top. "+ New Category" button.
- **Toolbar**: status filter tabs (All / Active / Completed), sort dropdown (Created Date ↑↓, Due Date ↑↓, Title ↑↓).
- **Task List**: virtualized if >100 items (use a simple windowing approach or just render all for simplicity). Each task card shows:
  - Checkbox (toggle complete)
  - Title (strikethrough if completed)
  - Category badge (colored pill, grey if uncategorized)
  - Due date chip — orange if due today, red if overdue, grey otherwise
  - Edit icon button → opens TaskModal
  - Delete icon button → opens ConfirmDialog
- **FAB** or prominent button: "+ New Task" → opens TaskModal in create mode.
- **Empty state**: friendly illustration + message when no tasks match filters.

#### TaskDetailPage
- Full detail view for a single task at `/tasks/:id`.
- Shows all fields, edit button (→ TaskModal), delete button (→ ConfirmDialog), back button.

---

### Components

#### TaskModal (create/edit)
- Fields: Title (required), Description (textarea), Category (select with user's categories + "None"), Due Date (datetime-local input), Status toggle.
- On save: optimistically update local state, then call API. On error, revert and show error.
- Show inline validation errors: empty title, invalid date.
- "Clear Due Date" button when a due date is set.

#### ConfirmDialog
- Modal overlay with message, "Cancel" and "Confirm" (destructive red) buttons.
- Used for task deletion and category deletion.

#### CategoryModal
- Simple modal with a single name input for create/rename.

---

### State Management
- Use React `useState` + `useEffect` + custom hooks. No Redux.
- `useTasks(filters)` hook: fetches tasks from API, exposes `tasks`, `loading`, `error`, `createTask`, `updateTask`, `deleteTask`, `toggleComplete`.
- `useCategories()` hook: fetches categories, exposes `categories`, `loading`, `createCategory`, `updateCategory`, `deleteCategory`.
- Preserve active filter/sort state in URL query params (e.g., `?status=active&sort_by=due_date&sort_dir=asc&category_id=...&search=...`) so that state survives page refresh within session.

---

### UI / UX Details
- **Responsive**: use Tailwind's `md:` breakpoints. Sidebar collapses to a drawer on mobile.
- **Overdue tasks**: red left border on task card + red due date chip.
- **Due today**: orange due date chip.
- **Completed tasks**: muted opacity (0.6) on card, title has `line-through`.
- **Immediate updates**: all create/update/delete/toggle operations update local state immediately (optimistic UI) without waiting for a full list re-fetch.
- **Error messages**: display in a dismissible red banner at top of page for API errors; inline below fields for validation errors.
- **Loading states**: skeleton loaders on initial task list load; spinner on buttons during async actions.
- **Empty search**: show "No tasks match your search" with a clear filters button.

---

### Nginx Configuration (`nginx.conf`)
```nginx
server {
  listen 80;
  root /usr/share/nginx/html;
  index index.html;

  location /health {
    return 200 '{"status":"ok"}';
    add_header Content-Type application/json;
  }

  location / {
    try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
  }
}
```

---

### Dockerfile
```dockerfile
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
ARG VITE_API_URL=/api
ENV VITE_API_URL=$VITE_API_URL
RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:1.25-alpine
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
```

---

### Security
- Never log or expose JWTs beyond localStorage.
- Use `rel="noopener noreferrer"` on any external links.
- Escape all user-supplied content rendered to DOM via React's default JSX escaping (never use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`).
- Set `autocomplete="current-password"` / `autocomplete="new-password"` on password inputs.
